headline: Domino's Growth Trends Reflect a New Phase for Pizza Demand
summary: DPZ's growth rests on aggregators, carryout, loyalty, technology and scale, though weak sales and estimate pressure cloud the near-term outlook.

headline: Shopify (SHOP) Gains A New DoorDash Link As Its Valuation Narrative Faces A Test
summary: Shopify (NasdaqGS:SHOP) is back in focus after DoorDash introduced a native integration that lets US brick-and-mortar Shopify merchants sell directly on the DoorDash marketplace, with synced inventory and streamlined onboarding. See our latest analysis for Shopify. Against this backdrop, Shopify’s 1 month share price return of 14.36% stands out compared with a year to date share price decline of 20.81%. At the same time, the 3 year total shareholder return of 88.12% contrasts with weaker 1...

headline: Is Shopify (SHOP) Quietly Turning DoorDash Integration Into a Moat for Omnichannel Commerce?
summary: Earlier this month, DoorDash announced that its marketplace is now a native sales channel within Shopify’s App Store, allowing US-based brick-and-mortar Shopify merchants to sync catalogs, inventory, and fulfillment directly without separate onboarding or workflow changes. This deeper DoorDash integration strengthens Shopify’s role as core infrastructure for omnichannel and on-demand retail, linking local merchants to new discovery and delivery routes while keeping operations centralized in...

headline: Ygal Arounian Rejoins Wedbush as Managing Director, Equity Research, Internet
summary: NEW YORK, July 21, 2026 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Wedbush, a leading financial services firm, is pleased to announce that Ygal Arounian has rejoined the firm as Managing Director, Equity Research, responsible for the firm’s Internet equity research coverage. Ygal brings 15 years of equity research experience to the role, most recently serving as Director of Internet Equity Research at Citi. He previously covered internet equities at Wedbush from 2018 to 2022, and spent more than six years at BMO Capit

Ygal brings 15 years of equity research experience to the role, most recently serving as Director of Internet Equity Research at Citi. He previously covered internet equities at Wedbush from 2018 to 2022, and spent more than six years at BMO Capit

headline: DoorDash (DASH) Stock Looks Fully Valued As Its 124% Run Continues
summary: DoorDash stock has delivered a strong 124.2% gain over the past three years, yet recent weakness and a low value score suggest the current price may be rich rather than a clear bargain. The 124.2% return over three years highlights how much optimism is already built into DoorDash, so new buyers need to think carefully about what is now priced in. Efforts to expand autonomous delivery and apply AI across operations can support long term growth expectations. At the same time, higher mandated...

headline: Is DoorDash (DASH) A Bargain Following Its Shopify And Hungry Howie's Deals?
summary: DoorDash (DASH) is in focus after two commerce announcements: a native integration into Shopify’s sales channels for US brick and mortar merchants, and a broad digital ordering and loyalty partnership with Hungry Howie’s. See our latest analysis for DoorDash. These commerce announcements come as DoorDash’s share price trades at US$189.02, with a 30 day share price return of 8.97% but a year to date decline of 14%.
